user.title: Create a Mood
user.description: Give your mood a memorable name that describes when you'll use it (e.g., 'Movie Night', 'Morning Coffee', 'Party').

select_lights.title: Choose Lights
select_lights.description: Select which lights this mood should control. You can choose multiple lights that will change together.

configure_lights.title: Configure Lights
configure_lights.description: Set the desired state for each light. Leave brightness, colour temperature, or RGB colour blank to skip that setting when the mood is activated.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Mood
reconfigure.description: Update your mood name, lights, and light settings.

error.no_lights_selected: Please select at least one light.
error.mood_name_exists: A mood with this name already exists. Please choose a different name.

activate_mood.name: Activate Mood
activate_mood.description: Activate a mood, saving current light states first.

mood_name.name: Mood Name
mood_name.description: The name of the mood to activate (exactly as entered during setup).

preset_name.name: Snapshot Label
preset_name.description: Optional label for the light state snapshot saved before activation.

restore_previous.name: Restore Previous
restore_previous.description: Restore the lights for a mood to their last saved state.

mood_name.name: Mood Name
mood_name.description: The name of the mood to restore (exactly as entered during setup).

save_state.name: Save State
save_state.description: Manually snapshot the current state of a mood's lights.

mood_name.name: Mood Name
mood_name.description: The name of the mood whose lights to snapshot (exactly as entered during setup).
